label: Graphic data
description: Visual rendering settings for a def. Maps to Verse.GraphicData in RimWorld source.

name.label: Name
name.description: Optional internal name tag. Rarely used in vanilla data. Marked [NoTranslate] in source.

texPath.label: Texture path
texPath.description: Path to the texture relative to the Textures folder, without file extension.

maskPath.label: Mask path
maskPath.description: Path to the texture mask relative to the Textures folder, without file extension.

graphicClass.label: Graphic class
graphicClass.description: C# class controlling how the texture is rendered. Must be a Graphic subclass.

shaderType.label: Shader type
shaderType.description: ShaderTypeDef reference selecting the GPU shader used to draw this graphic.

shaderParameters.label: Shader parameters
shaderParameters.description: Named shader property overrides. Each child element name is a shader property name; values are float, vector (starting with '('), or texture path (starting with '/'). Arbitrary child names are resolved by RimWorld at runtime.

color.label: Color
color.description: Primary RGBA tint applied to the texture.

colorTwo.label: Color two
colorTwo.description: Secondary RGBA tint used by shaders that support dual-colour rendering.

drawSize.label: Draw size
drawSize.description: Rendered size in world units as (width, height). Defaults to (1, 1). Some vanilla data uses a scalar shorthand such as '2.2'.

drawOffset.label: Draw offset
drawOffset.description: Base (x, y, z) world-space offset applied to the rendered graphic.

drawOffsetNorth.label: Draw offset north
drawOffsetNorth.description: Draw offset override when facing north.

drawOffsetEast.label: Draw offset east
drawOffsetEast.description: Draw offset override when facing east.

drawOffsetSouth.label: Draw offset south
drawOffsetSouth.description: Draw offset override when facing south.

drawOffsetWest.label: Draw offset west
drawOffsetWest.description: Draw offset override when facing west.

onGroundRandomRotateAngle.label: On-ground random rotate angle
onGroundRandomRotateAngle.description: Maximum random rotation angle in degrees when the thing lies on the ground. Wraps the cached graphic with Graphic_RandomRotated.

drawRotated.label: Draw rotated
drawRotated.description: Whether the graphic rotates with the thing's facing direction. Defaults to true.

allowFlip.label: Allow flip
allowFlip.description: Whether the graphic can be horizontally flipped for east/west variants. Defaults to true.

flipExtraRotation.label: Flip extra rotation
flipExtraRotation.description: Additional rotation applied when the graphic is flipped.

renderInstanced.label: Render instanced
renderInstanced.description: Whether to use GPU instancing for rendering. Defaults to false.

allowAtlasing.label: Allow atlasing
allowAtlasing.description: Whether the texture may be packed into a texture atlas. Defaults to true.

renderQueue.label: Render queue
renderQueue.description: Optional GPU render queue override. Affects draw order within a layer.

overlayOpacity.label: Overlay opacity
overlayOpacity.description: Opacity multiplier for overlay rendering. Between 0 and 1.

attachments.label: Attachments
attachments.description: List of additional GraphicData entries rendered as overlays attached to this graphic. Each <li> element is a nested GraphicData.

attachPoints.label: Attach points
attachPoints.description: List of named spatial anchor points on this graphic. Each <li> element is an AttachPoint with an offset and type.

addTopAltitudeBias.label: Add top altitude bias
addTopAltitudeBias.description: Whether to push this graphic slightly above its altitude layer at the top of the cell.

ignoreThingDrawColor.label: Ignore thing draw color
ignoreThingDrawColor.description: Whether to ignore the parent thing's draw color override.

shadowData.label: Shadow data
shadowData.description: Drop shadow settings for this graphic.

damageData.label: Damage data
damageData.description: Damage overlay textures and regions for this graphic.

linkType.label: Link type
linkType.description: Visual link drawing strategy used when this graphic links to adjacent things.

linkFlags.label: Link flags
linkFlags.description: Flags controlling which adjacent thing types this graphic links to. Each <li> is one flag value. Multiple flags can be combined using multiple <li> entries.

asymmetricLink.label: Asymmetric link
asymmetricLink.description: Settings for asymmetric link drawing, used with linkType Asymmetric.

cornerOverlayPath.label: Corner overlay path
cornerOverlayPath.description: Texture path for the corner overlay graphic used with Graphic_LinkedCornerOverlay.
